title: WAI-Lugs.jsonl is archive-only — bytype/signal/undelivered/ is canonical active signal store
description: WAI-Lugs.jsonl is the archive index for completed/retired lugs, not the active signal store. Active signals must be written as individual JSON files to WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/signal/undelivered/{id}.json. Signals in WAI-Lugs.jsonl are unreachable by routing gate, hub bulletin, and Gardener Tender.
rationale: Additive change — write to bytype/ instead of appending to WAI-Lugs.jsonl. WAI-Lugs.jsonl remains as archive.
decision_reason: Category: track-lug. Impact: 9/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
